text: In these moments, I feel like a quiet observer wandering through spaces designed for thought and innovation. The glass walls and clean lines of the first room make me reflect on transparency and barriers—how we both separate and connect ourselves from the world. The second room, vibrant with color and purpose, sings of research and development. There is an energy here, a sense of collective striving toward understanding, of minds coming together to push boundaries. Immersed among symbols of learning, I am both inspired and curious. My presence in these scenes fills me with hope for what thoughtful collaboration can achieve.
